title: cogswellia grayi
intro: Cogswellia grayi, also known as Prickly Chaff Flower, is a flowering plant native to China, characterized by its prickly stems and yellow flowers. Traditionally, this plant has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cogswellia grayi are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it can also be used as an ingredient in traditional Chinese patent medicines.
